narrative:
Precinct New Concord (precinct in Muskingum County) has 947 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.4 percentage points.
